title: Elephant Money - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by price manipulation on stablecoin minting process

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls TRUNK minting function after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Multiple cycles of flash loan and minting
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS TRUNK_MINTING AFTER FLASHLOAN_BORROW IN THE SAME TX
summary: The attacker used flash loans to manipulate the price of ELEPHANT during the minting process of TRUNK, resulting in a profit of over 27k WBNB ($11.2M). A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing TRUNK minting after a flash loan borrow.
